## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between NBD and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [45 initial topics live; seeing gradual uptake (19 clicks this week, 34 total)](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [35 new topics added; launching 10/week](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Copywriter feedback: tone/voice misalignment, grammar issues, formatting inconsistencies](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Need to update sitemap to include blog posts for better interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [45 initial topics now live on the blog](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Gradual increase in engagement: 19 clicks this week, 34 clicks total](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Seeing more impressions than before, indicating positive trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

### New Content Topics

  - [35 new topics added, with more planned to cover at least a month ahead](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Topics focus on ICPs, services, and SEO potential (high search volume, manageable keyword difficulty)](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Organized into previously identified clusters](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [One topic (fashion logos) to be removed due to lack of relevance to current clientele](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### Content Improvement Feedback

  - [Copywriter noted misalignment with brand tone of voice guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Some grammatical errors and formatting inconsistencies observed](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Language used is more sophisticated than the desired colloquial, youth-oriented tone](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Suggestion to include Q\&A sections for better SEO performance (Google snippets)](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Recommendation to add short, firm questions and answers for SEO efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

### SEO and Technical Issues

  - [Blog posts are being indexed by Google, but not appearing in the site's XML sitemap](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Currently have 39 pages recognized in the sitemap (website structure)](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Need to update sitemap to include blog posts for improved automated interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Social Media Content Strategy

  - [Team to create short-form content for social media (team culture, work culture, design topics)](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Considering expanding short-form posts into longer blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Potential strategy: Use social posts to drive traffic to more detailed blog content](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to send recap of planned improvements by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Review and tweak all 45 existing articles based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Implement FAQ sections and adjust tone to be more colloquial](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Work on including blog posts in the XML sitemap (Usman to handle)](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Continue with new content creation (10 topics/week)](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Beatriz to share list of social media topics once ready](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Consider inviting copywriter to future call for direct feedback (in about a month)](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare for potential blog expansions of NBD's social media content](https://fathom.video/share/ujjuoq6DpUz6FiwERss5r6DANyuGdso7?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
